issues.detail: 100% of sampled values look like currency/numeric text (e.g. "$1,200.50"). Stored as VARCHAR — arithmetic and aggregation will fail.
issues.suggestedFixSQL:
ALTER TABLE golden_format ADD COLUMN "amount_num" DOUBLE;
UPDATE golden_format SET "amount_num" = TRY_CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE("amount", '$', ''), ',', '') AS DOUBLE);

issues.detail: 2 distinct date formats detected in one column: YYYY-MM-DD, MM/DD/YYYY. Downstream date parsing will be inconsistent.
Fake-null sentinel string(s) found in sample: "n/a", "null". These masquerade as data but mean "missing".
issues.suggestedFixSQL: UPDATE golden_format SET "note" = NULL WHERE LOWER(TRIM("note")) IN ('null', 'n/a', 'na', 'none', '-', 'unknown') OR TRIM("note") = '';
